description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat and low-pitched gable roof, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with trees and shrubs. The structure features a combination of single and two-story sections, with large floor-to-ceiling windows along the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. The front yard is spacious and includes a driveway leading to a double garage, while the backyard features a rectangular swimming pool and a patio area with outdoor seating. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted wood, with contrasting darker roofing. The property is bordered by a driveway and a paved area, suggesting easy vehicle access. The overall design emphasizes open space, clean lines, and integration with the surrounding garden.
description: A modern bungalow with a mix of single and two-story sections, large windows, a double garage, and landscaped yards with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, pool, and patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gable roof, backyard landscaping, and the pool area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Driveway and garage view, with the main entrance and a clear view of the two-story section and front yard landscaping.
description_view_3: Side view showing the two-story section, backyard, and the pool, with the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
